sn22.23:1.2: “Monks, I will teach you the phenomena to be comprehended, as well as comprehension.
sn22.23:1.3: Listen & pay close attention. I will speak." “As you say, lord,” the monks responded to him. The Blessed One said,
sn22.23:1.4: “And which are the phenomena to be comprehended?
sn22.23:1.5: Form is a phenomenon to be comprehended. Feeling… Perception… Fabrications… Consciousness is a phenomenon to be comprehended.
sn22.23:1.6: These are called phenomena to be comprehended.
sn22.23:1.8: Any ending of passion, ending of aversion, ending of delusion:
